name: Plug N Play
one_liner: A gated web platform of plug-and-play teaching tools for middle-school (grades 6–8) teachers — a tagged, unit-first task library plus the Struggle Bus math-worksheet generator, with ELA and Science on the way.
left_off: Bold & playful homepage redesign landed (playground-hero, slim chrome, completed gray ramp); ELA and Science set to coming-soon pages.
next: Bring the inner pages up to the new design system.

components.name: Task Library
components.one_liner: Tagged, unit-first browse of rich tasks, thin slices, and teaching strategies, with favorites and one-click projection.

components.name: Struggle Bus (Math Generator)
components.one_liner: ~10,000-question math worksheet generator (Exit Ticket, Mild/Medium/Spicy, Proficiency Set), powered by a deployed Python rendering engine.

components.name: Whiteboard
components.one_liner: Freeform interactive whiteboard for live, projected lessons.

components.name: Groups
components.one_liner: Quick student grouping tool for organizing the room on the fly.
